name: MoneyGram
description_short: San Diego, CA's MoneyGram at 4874 Genesee Ave offers check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services with extended Friday hours.
description_long:
MoneyGram at 4874 Genesee Ave in San Diego, CA is a standalone check-cashing location serving the local community. Open Monday through Thursday from 9 AM to 7 PM, Friday 9 AM to 8 PM, and Saturday 9 AM to 5 PM, this San Diego location provides convenient access to essential financial services during extended business hours.

At this San Diego location, customers can cash checks, send money transfers domestically and internationally, pay bills, and access other money services. Call 858-273-5709 to confirm what services are available or ask about associated fees before visiting.

For San Diego residents needing quick check cashing or money transfers, bring a valid government-issued ID and proof of address. This standalone location near Genesee Ave offers the convenience of walk-in service without the complexities of traditional banking.
pros: 56+ locations across San Diego providing extensive geographic accessibility
Partnership with major retail chains like CVS for convenient locations near pharmacies
Both online and offline transaction options available
Multiple service types at single locations (check cashing, money transfers, bill payment)
Partner locations span diverse neighborhoods including South Bay (Otay), North County, and Central San Diego
Extended evening hours at many locations (some open until 10:00 PM)
Services available for both domestic and international money transfers
cons: Website provides no transparent fee structure or pricing information
Service quality and hours entirely dependent on individual partner locations
No information provided about exchange rates for international transfers
Limited details about transfer speed or processing times
Partner locations vary significantly in capabilities—not all offer all services
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing check cashing near retail locations
Customers sending money to family members domestically or internationally
People preferring in-person financial transactions over online banking
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and those needing quick cash access through convenient neighborhood locations, particularly via pharmacy and check-cashing partner outlets. The main caveat is that service availability, hours, and fees vary by individual partner location, requiring customers to verify specific capabilities before visiting.
services: In-person transaction services at partner retail locations
meta_description: MoneyGram at 4874 Genesee Ave, San Diego, CA. Check cashing and money transfers with extended Friday hours.
